title: gomphandra quadrifida var. maingayi
intro: Gomphandra quadrifida var. maingayi, also known as Maingay's gomphandra, is a plant species belonging to the family Stemonuraceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Maingay's gomphandra include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are used to make herbal teas and tonics.
